phases.name: Year 1
phases.subtitle: Explore
phases.description: Introduction to consumer sciences and personal finance.

milestones.label: Explore consumer science careers
milestones.description: Survey of FCS disciplines with emphasis on financial planning and consumer education.

milestones.label: Master microeconomics
milestones.description: Supply/demand, market structures, and consumer choice theory.

milestones.label: Build quantitative foundations
milestones.description: Math for financial calculations and investment modeling.

milestones.label: Study accounting
milestones.description: Financial accounting and personal financial statements.

phases.name: Year 2
phases.subtitle: Engage
phases.description: Consumer economics and financial planning foundations.

milestones.label: Study consumer economics
milestones.description: Consumer rights, protection laws, and financial literacy education.

milestones.label: Master personal financial planning
milestones.description: Budgeting, credit management, and financial goal setting.

milestones.label: Study family resource management
milestones.description: Household financial management across the family lifecycle.

milestones.label: Learn management
milestones.description: Management theory for financial services practice.

phases.name: Year 3
phases.subtitle: Develop
phases.description: CFP Board-registered courses in all major planning domains.

milestones.label: Master financial planning
milestones.description: CFP Board-registered: financial planning process and comprehensive plan development.

milestones.label: Study insurance planning
milestones.description: Life, health, disability, and liability insurance analysis.

milestones.label: Master tax planning
milestones.description: Federal income tax principles and tax-efficient strategies.

milestones.label: Study investment planning
milestones.description: Portfolio management, asset allocation, and retirement planning.

phases.name: Year 4
phases.subtitle: Launch
phases.description: Estate planning, capstone, internship, and CFP exam prep.

milestones.label: Complete estate & retirement planning
milestones.description: Estate documents, trusts, Social Security, and retirement distribution.

milestones.label: Complete capstone financial plan
milestones.description: Comprehensive financial plan covering all 8 CFP knowledge domains.

milestones.label: Complete financial services internship
milestones.description: Internship at financial planning firm, bank, or investment company.

milestones.label: Prepare for CFP exam
milestones.description: Review of all 8 CFP principal knowledge domains.
